items.name: Impact H-AR
items.description: Heavy assault rifle with reinforced frame and high-caliber firing system.

items.name: BR33 Volley Rifle
items.description: Semi-automatic precision rifle with three-round burst fire.

items.name: Misriah 2442
items.description: Pump-action shotgun kept for close encounters. Reloads one MIPS cartrige at a time.

items.name: Magnum MC
items.description: Heavy pistol equipped with modular muzzle and optics rail.

items.name: Protector V1
items.description: <plus>1 Shield Slot

items.name: Reinforced Shields V1
items.description:
Reinforces your base shields.

Reinforced shields take half damage.

items.name: Protector V2
items.description: <plus>2 Shield Slots

items.name: Protector V3
items.description: <plus>3 Shield Slots

items.name: Close and Personal
items.description: Your melee and knife attacks generate less heat.

items.name: Communal Cleanse
items.description: Removing a negative status effect with a consumable also removes it from nearby crew members.

items.name: Like for Like
items.description:
Defeating hostile with ballistic weapons reduces the duration of your active MCH status effects.

Defeating hostiles with volt weapons reduces the duration of your active OS status effects.

items.name: Breathing Space
items.description: Your Shroud increases your weapons' reload speed while in any smoke field.

items.name: Bombardier
items.description: Defeating hostiles while your Search and Destroy is active extends its duration.

items.name: Bombing Run
items.description: Each successive homing missle in your Search and Destroy volly deals increased damage.

items.name: Heavy Ordinance
items.description: Defeating hostiles with explosive damage reduces the cooldown of your next Search and Destroy.

items.name: Bad Cop
items.description: Performing a finisher grants tactical and prime ability energy.

items.name: Eye in the Sky
items.description: UESC Target Acquisition Devices that you access remain active for longer and release additional ping pulses.

items.name: Boutique
items.description: The Finer Things also grants weapon reload speed and Agility based on the number of items in your Backpack.

items.name: Crime Spree
items.description: Each container you open increases your Loot Speed. This increase resets when you're downed.

items.name: Keen Eye
items.description: ing a hostile with your X-Ray Visor extends its duration.

items.name: High Voltage
items.description: Defeating hostile affected by reduces the cooldown of your next Battery Overcharge.

items.name: Ounce of Prevention
items.description: Your Med-Drone increases Hardware and Firewall of crew members while attached.

items.name: Electron Recapture Sinks
items.description: While your Battery Overcharge is active, defeating a hostile or downing a Runner with a volt weapons instantly restores a portion of the weapon's charge.

items.name: Low Profile
items.description: You gain the effects of Signal Jammer while Power Sliding.

items.name: Out of Dodge
items.description: When your shields break, your generated heat is immediately cleared.

items.name: Cut to the Chase
items.description: Disrupt Cannon takes less time to overcharge.

Savior Complex

When you are the only remaining crew member alive, your Revive Speed is increased.

Back in Action

Using a Shield Charge or Patch Kit briefly increases your weapons' read and reload speed.

Ballistic Resistance

Reduces incoming UESC damage from ballistic weapons.

Bedside Manner

While a crew member is nearby, your Self-Repair Speed is increased and you use healing consumables more quickly.

Carnage Cartridge

Reloading after defeating a hostile overflows your magazine.

Clean Slate

After reviving a crew member, nearby crew members are cleansed of MCH and OS status effects.

Dr. Killjoy

Finisher Siphon restores health and shields after finishing a Runner.

Escape Vector

After reviving a crew member, you and nearby allies sprint faster and generate less heat for a short time.

Haptic Feedback

While you have a lingering effect from a consumable, gain increased Loot Speed.

Last Train Out

While final exfil is active, all your stats are increased.

Logic Bomb

Precision UESC eliminations nearby hostiles.

Muscular Augments

While under the effects of Cardio Kick, your sprint speed is faster.

Ordinance Report

Taking damage from a hostile's thrown or placed equipment automatically pings them.

Overclocked Cooling

While under the benefits of a Mechanic's Kit or OS Debug, gain increased Heat Capacity.

Recycler

Your finishers heal neaby allies a small amount.

Spectre Protocol

After a precision elimination, you become invisible.

Stolen Intel

Defeating a UESC commander ping nearby hostiles.

Sympathetic Reflex

Defeating a hostile grants increased ADS speed and weapon handling to you and nearby crew members.

Thermal Sinks

Sliding in water generates no heat.

Tox Injectors

Your knife heavy attacks briefly apply to the target.

Volt Resistance

Reduces incoming UESC damage from volt weapons.

Walk It Off

While you are affected by any negative status effect, defeating a hostile cleanses the effect.

Autonomous Emergency Kit

While your shields are depleted, defeating a hostile restores a portion of your shields.

No Stone Unturned

Opening an unlooted container loads a random amount of ammo into the magazines of your equipped weapons.

Rat Pack

While surrounded by hostiles, your sneak speed is increased.

Stealth Servos

After sprinting for a short time, sliding makes you invisible.

Pinata

Defeating UESC with explosives has a chance to generate credits.

items.name: Afterburner
items.description:
Sliding with this weapon reloads a portion of your magazine and increases stability and accuracy by a moderate amount.

Ballistic weapons reload from reserves. Volt weapons reload a smaller portion.

items.name: Afterburner
items.description:
Sliding with this weapon reloads a portion of your magazine and increases stability and accuracy by a significant amount.

Ballistic weapons reload from reserves. Volt weapons reload a smaller portion.

items.name: Alternating Current
items.description: Restore a small amount of health or shields when damaging a target affected by .

items.name: Alternating Current
items.description: Restore a moderate amount of health or shields when damaging a target affected by .

items.name: Background Process
items.description: When this weapon is stowed, it automatically reloads after a significant period of time.

items.name: Battle Runner
items.description: Eliminations with this weapon grant increased sprint speed for a short duration.

items.name: Bits Per Second
items.description: Rapid precision hits temporarily increase stability and reload speed by a small amount.

items.name: Bits Per Second
items.description: Rapid precision hits temporarily increase stability and reload speed by a significant amount.

items.name: Bits Per Second
items.description: Rapid precision hits temporarily increase stability and reload speed by a massive amount.

items.name: Bounty Hunter
items.description: Eliminating UESC pays you a few credits.

items.name: Bounty Hunter
items.description: Eliminating UESC pays you a small amount of credits.

items.description: Dealing a significant amount of sustained damage causes hostile to drop random ammo.

items.name: Chaos Theory
items.description: Dealing a considerable amount of sustained damage causes hostile to drop random ammo.

items.name: Chaos Theory
items.description: Dealing a moderate amount of sustained damage causes hostile to drop random ammo.

items.description: Eliminations with this weapon reload the magazine by a moderate amount.

items.name: Circuit Tracers
items.description: Eliminations with this weapon reload the magazine by a significant amount.

items.name: Cloudborn

items.name: Endless Runner

items.name: Eyes on Fire
items.description: Quickly after deactivation of a tactical or trait ability, eliminating a hostile grants a moderate amount of tactical and trait ability energy.

items.name: Five Finger Discount
items.description: Eliminating UESC or downing Runners with a melee or knife attack partially reloads this weapon by a moderate amount.

items.name: Insomniac
items.description: While under the effect of Energy Amp, eleminating hostiles with this weapon extends its duration by a small amount.

items.name: Insomniac

items.name: Insurance Plan

items.name: Insurrection
items.description: This weapon deals slightly increased damage against UESC forces.

items.name: Insurrection
items.description: This weapon deals considerably increased damage against UESC forces.

items.name: Insurrection
items.description: This weapon deals significantly increased damage against UESC forces.

items.name: Optimal Prime

items.description: Dealing damage quickly after your prime ability ends grants you the effects of Energy Amp for a moderate duration.

items.name: Optimal Prime
items.description: Dealing damage quickly after your prime ability ends grants you the effects of Energy Amp for a considerable duration.

items.name: Reckless Behaviour
